summary_one_line: ICC profile whose device-class FOURCC at offset 0x0c is 'link' (cmsSigLinkClass), driving cls==cmsSigLinkClass true

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The 4-byte device-class signature at file offset 0x0c-0x0f must equal the FOURCC 'link' (0x6c 0x69 0x6e 0x6b), which cmsGetDeviceClass returns as cmsSigLinkClass so the right disjunct (cls == cmsSigLinkClass) of the blocker condition is true.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: All five winner-resolving (value_profile_cmplog) seeds carry the literal bytes 6c 69 6e 6b ('link') at offsets 0x0c-0x0f, and the BYTE DIFF marks 0x0c-0x0f as clean DIFFER offsets where every winner byte equals the 'link' FOURCC.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: All five loser-blocking (value_profile) seeds carry 6d 6e 74 72 ('mntr', the display/monitor device class) at offsets 0x0c-0x0f; cmsGetDeviceClass returns a non-Link class so cls != cmsSigLinkClass and the seeds fall through to the else branch, taking the false side.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace on top of value_profile: the cmplog CMP buffer records the runtime comparand for the cls==cmsSigLinkClass check (the 4CC 'link') and I2SRandReplace splices that exact literal into the input bytes that feed cmsGetDeviceClass, flipping 'mntr' to 'link'. value_profile only has CMP_MAP Hamming/prefix-distance feedback and havoc, which cannot place the exact 4-byte 'link' literal at the device-class offset, so it stays blocked.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker condition takes its true side when the profile device class equals cmsSigLinkClass.
cls is the device class obtained from the profile handle via cmsGetDeviceClass.
Winner seeds contain the 'link' FOURCC in the header region.
Loser seeds carry the 'mntr' device class instead of 'link' at the same offsets.
Offsets 0x0c-0x0f are clean DIFFER offsets: winners hold 'link' bytes, losers hold 'mntr' bytes.
value_profile_cmplog's mutator set includes I2SRandReplace, enabling exact-literal substitution.
value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace, relying only on CMP_MAP distance feedback and havoc.
The branch is decisively resolved by the winner and blocked by the loser (prob_div=0.80).

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 2418 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 1dc1b482f32321a1` and observed an I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 4; corroborated by seed 18b267ad30349d2b which shows a dash row at depth 12. Both winning vpc seeds therefore have an unwrapped I2SRandReplace ancestor.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness that gates the true side on cls==cmsSigLinkClass via the 4-byte 'link' FOURCC where value_profile resolves the branch as fast/often as value_profile_cmplog, showing CMP_MAP distance feedback alone suffices to place the exact literal.

weakest_evidence_point: Whether the right disjunct (cls==cmsSigLinkClass) rather than the left (lIsInput, driven by the Lab/XYZ color-space bytes at 0x10-0x17) is the actual deciding edge — both differ cleanly between W and L seeds, so the 'link' FOURCC could be co-varying rather than causal.
